case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY LEON SAVOY BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY LEON SAVOY BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,083.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY LEON SAVOY BAIL BONDS
REIMBURSEMENT FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
